definitions.name: Sealed Evidence Registry
definitions.summary: A cold records hall where confiscated objects are taught to become inventory numbers.

features.name: breathing evidence cabinet
features.description: Its numbered drawers inhale whenever an undocumented wonder enters the room.

features.name: confiscation index wheel
features.description: Thousands of red tabs orbit a blank category reserved for the player.

features.name: scrubbed testimony desk
features.description: Grooves in the marble show where witnesses gripped it before revising themselves.
